summary: The implementation addresses all four requirements (REQ-118, REQ-119, REQ-120, REQ-121) by adding comprehensive error handling, logging, and authentication flow improvements. Backend admin authentication is refactored through the AccessControl module, the AdminPanel component is wrapped in an error boundary, the admin route includes proper loading/authentication checks, and extensive console logging aids debugging. The implementation appears complete and aligned with the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a 'Copy Principal ID' button with clipboard functionality in the AdminPanel user identity card
hallucinated_features.reason: This feature was not requested in any requirement. The BuildRequest focused on fixing admin panel access errors, not adding new UI features for copying principal IDs.

hallucinated_features.description: Created AdminErrorBoundary component with detailed error display UI including stack traces and component stacks
hallucinated_features.reason: While error handling was requested (REQ-119 AC: 'Loading and error states are handled gracefully'), a full-featured error boundary component with detailed stack trace display UI goes beyond graceful error handling and was not explicitly requested.
